prompt: Generate timeline SVG, detector slice diagrams at ticks 0/3/6, and crumble URL from a surface code circuit.

assertions.name: script_runs_successfully
assertions.description: The Python script exits without errors

assertions.name: timeline_svg_generated
assertions.description: A timeline SVG file is created

assertions.name: detslice_svgs_generated
assertions.description: Detector slice SVG files are created for the requested ticks

assertions.name: crumble_url_output
assertions.description: A crumble URL is generated and printed/saved
